description_long: This is a robust, dark metallic helmet with a classical design reminiscent of ancient warrior headgear, featuring a pronounced T-shaped face opening and a pair of large, upward-curving silver horns attached to either side. The helmet's main body is matte black with subtle gold trim outlining the face opening and the lower edge, adding a touch of elegance and contrast. The horns are smooth, metallic, and slightly asymmetrical, giving the helmet a distinctive and intimidating appearance. The rear of the helmet is solid and rounded, providing full cranial coverage, while the sides extend downward to protect the cheeks and jaw. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs, emphasizing a utilitarian and battle-ready aesthetic. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with padding for comfort and fit.
description: A matte black, gold-trimmed helmet with large silver horns and a T-shaped face opening, evoking a classical warrior style. The design is solid, imposing, and lacks visible graphics or ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped face opening, gold trim, and both large silver horns prominently.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature and attachment of the left horn, with the helmet's solid side and gold trim visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the symmetrical placement of the horns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right horn and the helmet's protective side profile.
